# Antitoxin

- **Type**: G|XPHB
- **Cost**: 50 gp

As a [[bonus_action Action]], you can drink a vial of Antitoxin to gain [[advantage]] on saving throws to avoid or end the [[poisoned]] condition for 1 hour.
